# Zamorak 2000% Duo Melee-Ranged (Hybrid) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/E9HmNuzAe2.png
*Note: a **Table of Contents** can be found in the pins.*

.
## __Introduction__
.tag:intro
This is an **advanced guide** which assumes a strong underlying knowledge of all mechanics and information presented in <#1020560033173479464> and <#1251104943566491710>.

.
## __Presets and Relics__
.tag:presets
⬥ [Ranged-Melee(base)](https://presets.pvme.io/?id=92ce878a-d5e5-427f-8fdf-9fddc3665e9e) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
⬥ [Ranged-Melee(dps)](<https://presets.pvme.io/?id=44e4118d-85e2-46e3-b518-1e80b079f64e>) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.

.
## __Rotations__
.tag:rotations
⬥ This rotation aims to achieve sub 3:20 minute kills.
⬥ Pad order used: **6 → 2 → 1 → 3 → 4 → 5**
⬥ This rotation requires strict adherence to <:perfectequilibrium:1006119102814887957> stacks and any variation should be adjusted to accordingly.

.
### __Witches__
**Base:** witch 1 <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → witch 3 <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:naturalinstinct:535541258131865633> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578>

**DPS:** witch 3 <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:pulverise:535532879053062146> → wait → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> witch 4 same tick as base → <:berserk:535532854004678657> <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538>

.
### __Phase 1__
**Base:** <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> + <:surge:535533810004262912> + <:dive:1049378668197195808> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:annihilation:796989662983094275> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:prep:535541258546970624> → <:surge:535533810004262912> <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:rend:1478166426190741584>

**DPS:** <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:res:535541258844635148> → 2t <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → s<:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → r<:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210> + 2t <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> + <:surge:535533810004262912> → s<:overpower:535532879334080517>

.
### Witch
r<:overpower:535532879334080517> + <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744>

.
### __Phase 2__
**Base:** <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:enfeeble:567727986409734145> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:rapid:535541270521708566> →
<:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416>

**DPS:** <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:nightmaregauntlets:513190159441723392> <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416> 2t <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → s<:deadshot:1478061860371828929>

.
### Witch
r<:deadshot:1478061860371828929> + <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → (<:punish:535532879439069184>)

*Note: DPS <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> is 2t behind base*

.
### __Phase 3__
**Base:** <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> →
<:ezk:903244090953588787> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> (refund) → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>

**DPS:** <:reflect:535541258786177064> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:dba:603979368850653216> 2t <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → s<:rend:1478166426190741584>
.
### Witch
r<:rend:1478166426190741584> + <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:disrupt:535614336207552523> + <:punish:535532879439069184>

*Note: DPS can optionally apply <:smokecloud:856635090641879050> before <:dba:603979368850653216> <:spec:537340400273195028> if p2 witch died to <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938>*

.
### __Phase 4__
**Base:** <:pulverise:535532879053062146> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:reflect:535541258786177064> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:deathsswiftness:1478061862405931120> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416>

**DPS:** <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:rapid:535541270521708566> → (protector)<:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:wenarrows:971025697046925362> <:sgb:626466665848242186> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:nightmaregauntlets:513190159441723392> <:snipe:1478061857486143498> 2t <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → s<:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → swap to <:fularrow:971025696958853180>
.
### Witch
r<:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:shadowtend:642713547142332416>

.
### __Phase 5__
**Base:** <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:fularrow:971025696958853180> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:res:535541258844635148> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> <:surge:535533810004262912> <:dive:1049378668197195808> → <:reflect:535541258786177064> → s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → s<:gflurry:535532879283879977> →
r<:gflurry:535532879283879977> + <:ezk:903244090953588787> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640>

**DPS:** <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> / <:lengmh:883134308146098227> <:spec:537340400273195028> (refund) → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> 2t <:realmmovement:1073955377537876089> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>
.
### Witch
<:disrupt:535614336207552523> → s<:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → r<:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> + <:cane:535532878969438210>

.
### __Phase 6__
**Base:** <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> <:surge:535533810004262912> <:dive:1049378668197195808> → <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:devo:513190158728953857> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → s<:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> +
<:dive:1049378668197195808> <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:cane:535532878969438210>

**DPS:** 2t <:devo:513190158728953857> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:gflurry:535532879283879977> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (refund) → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → (<:punish:535532879439069184>)

*Notes:*
⬥ *<:disrupt:535614336207552523> is used to block invisible auto from Zamorak.*
⬥ *Optionally <:cept:543478434509357098> base while under <:devo:513190158728953857>*

.
### __Phase 7__
**DPS:** chip western runes
Rune 1: <:dba:603979368850653216> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → <:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:divert:787904334377648130> / <:res:535541258844635148>
Rune 2: <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>
Rune 3: <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938>
Pre-zam: <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> / <:meleebasic:1478062907295010906> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → wait for teammate to <:gbarge:535532879250456578> rune, <:gbarge:535532879250456578> 1t after → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → s<:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>

**Base**
<:anti:535541306475151390> → <:surge:535533810004262912> tc <:ent:567727987274022924> demon → <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:surge:535533810004262912> to eastern runes
Runes (chip)
Rune 1: <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417>
Rune 2: <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:dba:603979368850653216> <:spec:537340400273195028>

**Rune 1**
<:gbarge:535532879250456578> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640>
**Rune 2**
<:gflurry:535532879283879977> → s<:cane:535532878969438210> + <:dive:1049378668197195808> to <:zamorak:994914159969976440>

**Zamorak**
**DPS:** r<:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> + <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → (<:punish:535532879439069184>)
**Base:** r<:cane:535532878969438210> + <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → (<:punish:535532879439069184>)

.

.tag:example

⬥ [Duo 2k R/M (Witch)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFm3NyUQy1I) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.

.
